category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to EU market (PPE Regulation 2016/425, EN 149 FFP).

title.en: China-to-EU PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入欧盟（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入歐盟（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against EU requirements under PPE Regulation (EU) 2016/425, harmonised standard EN 149:2001+A1:2009 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), mandatory Notified Body conformity assessment, CE marking, EU Declaration of Conformity, and the critical PPE-vs-medical device boundary with MDR (EU) 2017/745.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与欧盟要求对照，涵盖PPE法规（EU）2016/425、协调标准EN 149:2001+A1:2009（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、公告机构强制合格评定、CE标志、欧盟符合性声明，以及PPE与医疗器械（MDR（EU）2017/745）的关键界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與歐盟要求對照，涵蓋PPE法規（EU）2016/425、協調標準EN 149:2001+A1:2009（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、公告機構強制合格評定、CE標誌、歐盟符合性聲明，以及PPE與醫療器械（MDR（EU）2017/745）的關鍵界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EU law, harmonised standards, notified body scope, and destination-country market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical device boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行欧盟法律、协调标准、公告机构范围及目的地国市场监督实践。本文所述的PPE与医疗器械界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行歐盟法律、協調標準、公告機構範圍及目的地國市場監督實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫療器械界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators (EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) are Category III PPE under EU Regulation 2016/425, requiring mandatory Notified Body involvement for type-examination (Module B) and production conformity (C2 or D) — self-certification is not permitted. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy EN 149 requirements. A critical boundary: surgical masks (EN 14683) are medical devices under MDR 2017/745, not PPE — the wrong classification triggers a completely different regulatory route.
answer_first.zh: FFP呼吸器（EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）依据欧盟法规2016/425属III类PPE，须强制引入公告机构进行型式检验（模块B）及生产一致性（C2或D）——不允许自我认证。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足EN 149要求。关键界定：外科口罩（EN 14683）属MDR 2017/745下的医疗器械，而非PPE——错误分类将触发完全不同的监管路径。
answer_first.zht: FFP呼吸器（EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）依據歐盟法規2016/425屬III類PPE，須強制引入公告機構進行型式檢驗（模組B）及生產一致性（C2或D）——不允許自我認證。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足EN 149要求。關鍵界定：外科口罩（EN 14683）屬MDR 2017/745下的醫療器械，而非PPE——錯誤分類將觸發完全不同的監管路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. EUR-Lex and europa.eu official URLs are the primary sources for EU legislation. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
